$comment: Machine-readable section contracts derived from templates/*.md -- consumed by tools/document_assembly.py's --template flag (open-decisions.md #2's enforcement wrapper). Each heading_pattern is a regex matched (re.search) against the rendered section headings in order; allow_extra_sections=false means the document must have exactly these sections, one per pattern, in this order. rebuttal_points has no entry on purpose: its structure repeats per denial reason (dynamic section count), so fixed-list enforcement can't express it -- templates/rebuttal-points.md stays prompt-enforced and critic-verified. When templates/*.md changes section structure, this file changes in the same commit (D4).
